workItem.title: Serialize delivery per repository while preserving global concurrency
workItem.body:

## Context

Two simultaneous AgentRuns writing the same repository audit ref consumed 771 GitHub REST requests in 36 seconds through optimistic CAS contention; one worker consumed 26 requests in 30 seconds. Production delivery also reran unchanged checks and held the user-facing result on non-critical audit work.

## Expected outcome

Symphony permits concurrent delivery across different repositories, admits at most one claimed Issue per repository, preserves retry and blocked reservations, and keeps exact-commit production verification on a short critical path.

## Scope

- Derive canonical repository identity for every tracker Issue
- Reserve repository capacity across running, retrying, and blocked claims
- Queue same-repository work without consuming Attempt or retry budget
- Document exact-commit evidence reuse, concurrent independent probes, and outbox flushing
- Install and verify the exact reviewed escript on X1

## Out of scope

- Relaxing DeploymentVerification
- Allowing direct GitHub access
- Distributed multi-host leases

## Acceptance criteria

- Different repositories may use global agent slots concurrently
- At most one claimed Issue per repository can execute at a time
- Retrying and blocked claims continue to reserve their repository
- Capacity waiting does not consume an Attempt or retry budget
- Full Elixir gate passes with 100 percent coverage, Credo, and Dialyzer
- Installed escript hash equals the exact reviewed artifact
